# Step 9 — Bookmark + Import Tests

> **Epic**: E1.3.5 | **Task**: T1.3.5.2.1.3 (partial) + T1.3.5.3.1.3
> **Depends on**: Steps 4, 5, 7, 8 (implementations must exist)
> **Parallelizable with**: Step 7 (get_text tests can be written against contract)
> **Skills to load**: `flutter-testing-apps`, `riverpod-testing`

Shared context: [E1.3.5 Instapaper Context](../instructions/e1.3.5-instapaper-context.instructions.md)

---

## Task

Create unit tests for the bookmark list endpoint, bookmarks provider, get_text endpoint, and article import pipeline. Use `mocktail` for HTTP mocking and Riverpod test containers.

---

## Files to Create

### 1. Add tests to `test/features/content/services/instapaper_client_test.dart`

Extend the file created in Step 2 with new groups:

#### Group: getBookmarks

```dart
group('getBookmarks', () {
  setUp(() {
    client.setTokens(token: 'tok', tokenSecret: 'sec');
  });

  test('returns list of bookmarks on success', () async {
    when(() => mockHttp.post(any(), headers: any(named: 'headers'), body: any(named: 'body')))
        .thenAnswer((_) async => http.Response(
          jsonEncode({
            'user': {'type': 'user', 'user_id': 123, 'username': 'test'},
            'bookmarks': [
              {
                'type': 'bookmark',
                'bookmark_id': 1001,
                'url': 'https://example.com/article1',
                'title': 'Test Article',
                'description': 'A test article',
                'hash': 'abc123',
                'progress': 0.5,
                'progress_timestamp': 1700000000,
                'time': 1699000000,
                'starred': '0',
                'private_source': '',
              },
              {
                'type': 'bookmark',
                'bookmark_id': 1002,
                'url': 'https://example.com/article2',
                'title': 'Second Article',
                'description': '',
                'hash': 'def456',
                'progress': 0.0,
                'progress_timestamp': 0,
                'time': 1699000001,
                'starred': '1',
                'private_source': '',
              },
            ],
            'highlights': [],
          }),
          200,
        ));

    final bookmarks = await client.getBookmarks();
    expect(bookmarks, hasLength(2));
    expect(bookmarks[0].bookmarkId, equals(1001));
    expect(bookmarks[0].title, equals('Test Article'));
    expect(bookmarks[0].progress, equals(0.5));
    expect(bookmarks[0].domain, equals('example.com'));
    expect(bookmarks[0].hasProgress, isTrue);
    expect(bookmarks[1].starred, isTrue);
    expect(bookmarks[1].hasProgress, isFalse);
  });

  test('returns empty list when no bookmarks', () async {
    when(() => mockHttp.post(any(), headers: any(named: 'headers'), body: any(named: 'body')))
        .thenAnswer((_) async => http.Response(
          jsonEncode({'user': {}, 'bookmarks': [], 'highlights': []}),
          200,
        ));

    final bookmarks = await client.getBookmarks();
    expect(bookmarks, isEmpty);
  });

  test('filters out non-bookmark types from response', () async {
    when(() => mockHttp.post(any(), headers: any(named: 'headers'), body: any(named: 'body')))
        .thenAnswer((_) async => http.Response(
          jsonEncode({
            'user': {},
            'bookmarks': [
              {'type': 'bookmark', 'bookmark_id': 1, 'url': 'https://a.com', 'title': 'A'},
              {'type': 'meta', 'some': 'data'},
            ],
            'highlights': [],
          }),
          200,
        ));

    final bookmarks = await client.getBookmarks();
    expect(bookmarks, hasLength(1));
  });

  test('throws InstapaperApiException on error', () async {
    when(() => mockHttp.post(any(), headers: any(named: 'headers'), body: any(named: 'body')))
        .thenAnswer((_) async => http.Response(
          '[{"type":"error","error_code":1040,"message":"Rate-limit exceeded"}]',
          400,
        ));

    expect(
      () => client.getBookmarks(),
      throwsA(isA<InstapaperApiException>().having((e) => e.errorCode, 'errorCode', 1040)),
    );
  });

  test('clamps limit to 1-500', () async {
    when(() => mockHttp.post(any(), headers: any(named: 'headers'), body: any(named: 'body')))
        .thenAnswer((_) async => http.Response(
          jsonEncode({'user': {}, 'bookmarks': [], 'highlights': []}),
          200,
        ));

    await client.getBookmarks(limit: 0);  // should clamp to 1
    await client.getBookmarks(limit: 1000);  // should clamp to 500

    final captured = verify(() => mockHttp.post(
      any(),
      headers: any(named: 'headers'),
      body: captureAny(named: 'body'),
    )).captured;

    expect((captured[0] as Map)['limit'], equals('1'));
    expect((captured[1] as Map)['limit'], equals('500'));
  });
});
```

#### Group: getBookmarkText

```dart
group('getBookmarkText', () {
  setUp(() {
    client.setTokens(token: 'tok', tokenSecret: 'sec');
  });

  test('returns HTML string on success', () async {
    const html = '<html><body><p>Article content here.</p></body></html>';
    when(() => mockHttp.post(any(), headers: any(named: 'headers'), body: any(named: 'body')))
        .thenAnswer((_) async => http.Response(html, 200));

    final result = await client.getBookmarkText(bookmarkId: 1001);
    expect(result, equals(html));
  });

  test('throws InstapaperApiException with code 1041 on premium required', () async {
    when(() => mockHttp.post(any(), headers: any(named: 'headers'), body: any(named: 'body')))
        .thenAnswer((_) async => http.Response(
          '[{"type":"error","error_code":1041,"message":"Premium account required"}]',
          403,
        ));

    expect(
      () => client.getBookmarkText(bookmarkId: 1001),
      throwsA(isA<InstapaperApiException>().having((e) => e.errorCode, 'errorCode', 1041)),
    );
  });

  test('throws InstapaperApiException with code 1550 on text generation error', () async {
    when(() => mockHttp.post(any(), headers: any(named: 'headers'), body: any(named: 'body')))
        .thenAnswer((_) async => http.Response(
          '[{"type":"error","error_code":1550,"message":"Error generating text"}]',
          400,
        ));

    expect(
      () => client.getBookmarkText(bookmarkId: 1001),
      throwsA(isA<InstapaperApiException>().having((e) => e.errorCode, 'errorCode', 1550)),
    );
  });

  test('sends bookmark_id in request body', () async {
    when(() => mockHttp.post(any(), headers: any(named: 'headers'), body: any(named: 'body')))
        .thenAnswer((_) async => http.Response('<p>text</p>', 200));

    await client.getBookmarkText(bookmarkId: 42);

    final captured = verify(() => mockHttp.post(
      any(),
      headers: any(named: 'headers'),
      body: captureAny(named: 'body'),
    )).captured;

    expect((captured[0] as Map)['bookmark_id'], equals('42'));
  });
});
```

### 2. Create `test/features/content/providers/instapaper_bookmarks_provider_test.dart`

Test the bookmarks provider and article import provider state transitions.

```dart
import 'package:flutter_test/flutter_test.dart';
import 'package:mocktail/mocktail.dart';
import 'package:flutter_riverpod/flutter_riverpod.dart';
// Import providers and models
```

#### Test Cases

```dart
group('InstapaperBookmarks', () {

    // Verify provider returns empty list

  test('fetches bookmarks when authenticated', () async {

    // Override client to return bookmark list

});

group('InstapaperArticleImport', () {
  test('starts in idle state', () {
    // Verify initial state is ArticleImportIdle
  });

  test('transitions to loading then done on successful import', () async {
    // Mock getBookmarkText to return HTML
    // Call importArticle
    // Verify Loading → Done with ExtractedDocument
  });

  test('transitions to error on API failure', () async {
    // Mock getBookmarkText to throw 1041
    // Verify state is ArticleImportError with Premium message
  });

  test('clear resets to idle', () {
    // Set state to Done, call clear(), verify Idle
  });

  test('normalises HTML through ContentNormaliser', () async {
    // Mock getBookmarkText to return real HTML
    // Verify document has sentences/words (ContentNormaliser worked)
  });
});
```

---

## Verification

```bash
flutter test test/features/content/services/instapaper_client_test.dart
flutter test test/features/content/providers/instapaper_bookmarks_provider_test.dart
```

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Test: `getBookmarks` returns parsed bookmark list with all fields
- [ ] Test: empty bookmark list handled
- [ ] Test: non-bookmark types filtered from response
- [ ] Test: rate limit (1040) throws `InstapaperApiException`
- [ ] Test: limit clamped to 1-500
- [ ] Test: `getBookmarkText` returns HTML string
- [ ] Test: 1041 (Premium required) throws typed error
- [ ] Test: 1550 (text generation error) throws typed error
- [ ] Test: bookmarks provider returns empty list when unauthenticated
- [ ] Test: article import transitions Idle → Loading → Done
- [ ] Test: article import error shows user-friendly message
- [ ] Test: `clear()` resets to idle
- [ ] All tests use mocked HTTP (no real network calls)
- [ ] All tests pass
